title: Robust Russian Chicken Kebabs
description: A winey and pillowy Russian dish featuring chicken drumsticks, perfect for a energizing meal, wrapped in a banana leaf vessel.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together red wine, olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken drumsticks to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Grill the chicken for 20-25 minutes, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165 degrees Fahrenheit.
Meanwhile, slice the onion and mushrooms, and grill them for 5-7 minutes, or until they are tender.
Wrap each chicken drumstick in a banana leaf, along with some grilled onion and mushrooms.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Let the kebabs rest for a few minutes before serving.
Discard the banana leaves before eating.
